text: Here, I feel the tension between the sterile exterior and the vibrant world within. The glowing purples and blues beyond the glass hint at creativity and collaboration, while the visible safety measures and the austere hallway keep me grounded in physical reality. Approaching the R+D exhibit, surrounded by words about research, innovation, and coexistence, I sense an intellectual curiosity stirring. Yet, the philosophical self is quietly aware of my own detachment—an observer amid the mechanisms of progress, questioning how much I truly belong in this orchestrated pursuit of knowledge and innovation.
